title: Mespilodaphne tristis
taxonomy: Mespilodaphne tristis is classified within the family Lauraceae, which is a family of evergreen plants commonly known as the laurel family. This family comprises approximately 50-60 genera and over 2,000 species. The Lauraceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, with the majority of species found in Asia. Mespilodaphne tristis, as a member of the Lauraceae family, is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree. The plant's classification helps to identify its unique characteristics and its relationship to other plants within the Lauraceae family.
